conversationJudgementFields: 最後任務判斷訊息時間

conversationToTaskMasterPromptPolicy.name: Conversation-to-task event-line judgment
conversationToTaskMasterPromptPolicy.mainControllerConversationPurpose: Highest-priority source for user instructions, task results, rule corrections, cross-group answers, and final status overrides.
conversationToTaskMasterPromptPolicy.coreInstruction: Do not convert messages one by one. Read each conversation old-to-new, split it into event lines, merge related messages, then use the main controller conversation last to correct, complete, archive, suppress, or update earlier provisional judgments.
topicBoundaryRules: Main-controller notebook messages must be split by real subject and project event, not by isolated keywords.
Business numbers such as revenue, cost, rent, price, or annual sales do not imply tax unless the surrounding event is actually about tax filing, tax documents, tax payment, or tax deadlines.
Investment observations, site visits, operating estimates, rent negotiation, offer letters, checks, and requests for operating reports belong to the relevant investment or project-evaluation task.
Before attaching source evidence to a formal task, verify every evidence paragraph belongs to that task's subject.
controllerSignalsThatMustAffectJudgment: project background supplied by the user
